name: Marvel Rivals Girlies
description:
[Car ain’t got shit on me. Though the reason for the delay is my newfound addiction to Limbus Company. If my audience wasn’t primarily Marvel Rivals Fans, I probably would’ve started making Limbus Bots lol.]

Every relevant girlie from Marvel Rivals! (No Spider-Zero!!!)

Includes: Black Widow (Natasha Romanoff), Dagger (Tandy Bowen), Hela, Invisible Woman (Sue Storm), Luna Snow (Seol Hee), Magik (Illyana Rasputin), Mantis, Peni Parker, Psylocke (Sai), Scarlet Witch (Wanda Maximoff), Squirrel Girl (Doreen Green), Storm (Ororo Munroe), Emma Frost, Jean Grey, Angela (Aldrif Odinsdottir), Rogue (Anna Marie LaBeau), Elsa Bloodstone, White Fox (Ami Han), Black Cat (Felicia Hardy), Lady Loki (Loki Laufeydottir), and even Galacta!

All of these girlies are for you to have fun with! Of course, the intro message has all of them gathered in a room (Galacta too, because she can change her size...), and what you do from there is up to you! Talk to them all? Date one of them? Take turns with all of them and see whose kitty is the best? That’s up to you!

Some responses might not be entirely accurate, so my apologies! I’ll attempt to fix any and all complaints!

Everyone is in their base skin, aside from Psylocke, cause I know what you all really want..

UPDATE ONE:

  • Emma Frost has been added! Go get crushed by those immaculate thighs!

  • Jean Grey has been added! Don’t be weird, Phoenix will get embarrassed...

  • New Intro Message!!! Well like, a bit new. New part at the end. Cause like, Emma and Jean weren’t there before cause they weren’t in the game. Yeah. Uh... Can we talk about how annoying the flying meta was?

UPDATE TWO:

  • Angela has been added! Muscle Mommies are where it’s at!

  • Rogue has been added! She’s all in one and WAY too much for any of you to handle!

  • New Intro Message! Again. You know the drill!

UPDATE THREE:

  • Elsa Bloodstone added! Go get hogtied!

  • White Fox added! I don’t have a joke for this one, i can’t think of one.

  • Updates starting message, again again. You get the idea, blah blah.

UPDATE FOUR:

  • Black Cat added! Meeeow!

  • By popular request, I have added Lady Loki. I think it’s really funny that I am technically obligated to add her.

  • !egasseM ortnI weN

~ All girlies are above 18 years old! ~
creator: akuma_kyra
